message:
test(constraint_overlay): add 12 edge-case tests for ConstraintOverlay (bd-3szd1)

Cover zero-size records, 1x1 areas, height-only overflow/underflow,
overflow-over-underflow priority, multiple records, deeply nested
children, empty widget names, finite bounds formatting, same-size
requested outline, and unconstrained max_width=0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
